title: TikTok Video Management Platform
description: Built a FastAPI backend with user authentication, bulk download, and direct TikTok upload functionality. Integrated Redis and Celery for background task processing.

title: Parkinson's Disease Detection from EEG
description: Classified Parkinson's Disease from EEG signals using XGBoost and a CNN-LSTM hybrid model with custom feature extraction across five frequency bands.

title: ML Model Trainer Web Application
description: Developed a web app for training and evaluating machine learning models, leveraging pandas, numpy, and scikit-learn.

title: Grocery Store NOVA Food Classification
description: Analyzed grocery product data from Walmart, Target, and Whole Foods using NOVA food processing classifications. Built grouped bar charts for comparing store compositions.

title: SQL Analytics — Chinook & Airlines
description: Wrote complex queries, relational algebra, and optimized database performance with clustered and nonclustered indexes on PostgreSQL.

title: BCI Motor Imagery Classification
description: Built a brain-computer interface pipeline using Common Spatial Patterns and Linear Discriminant Analysis to classify motor imagery EEG signals.

title: P300 EEG Signal Analysis
description: Analyzed P300 event-related potentials from EEG data, performing signal processing and feature extraction for BCI applications.

title: TF-IDF Text Classification Pipeline
description: Built a full scikit-learn pipeline for text classification using TF-IDF features, covering data wrangling, feature engineering, and model evaluation.

title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: Designed and built a personal portfolio site with HTML and CSS, published on GitHub Pages with a CV, projects, and contact form.

title: Probability & Combinatorics Problem Sets
description: Worked through advanced probability problems including counting, inclusion-exclusion, Bayes rule, conditional probability, and binomial distributions.

title: Econometrics Research — ECON 120A
description: Applied econometric methods including OLS regression, hypothesis testing, and statistical inference to real-world economic datasets.

title: Graph Theory & Algorithm Analysis
description: Implemented connected components, BFS and DFS algorithms, and analyzed time complexity of various data structures and sorting algorithms.
